Klasse TG55FormatSpecifiers

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.test.TG55FormatSpecifiers
public final class TG55FormatSpecifiers extends Object
Yamaha TG55 SyxEx message format specifiers (for test cases and tutorials).
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    static final String
    F_TG55_BD_HEADER1
    Bulk header 1 message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BD_HEADER2
    Bulk header 2 message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BDMU_EFFECT
    Multi effect message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BDMU_HEADER
    Multi bulk header message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BDMU_VOICE
    Multi voice message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BDVC_HEADER
    Voice bulk header message part.
    static final String
    F_TG55_BULK_REQUEST
    Bulk request message.
    static final String
    F_TG55_PARCNG1
    Parameter change message w/ parameter 's'.
    static final String
    F_TG55_PARCNG2
    Parameter change message w/ parameters 't', 'f', 'e' and 'c'.
